name: Hasinur Rahman
title: Full Stack MERN Developer
tagline: Building scalable, high-performance web applications with clean UI/UX
bio: I am a passionate Full Stack Developer specializing in the MERN stack. I focus on building modern, responsive, and user-friendly web applications using MERN Stack. I enjoy solving real-world problems and continuously improving my skills through hands-on projects.
summary: I develop high-performance web applications with a strong focus on clean architecture, maintainability, and user experience. I aim to write scalable and efficient code while delivering visually appealing interfaces.
experienceLevel: Junior to Mid-level (2+ years of hands-on development experience)
availability: Open to remote and onsite opportunities

education.degree: Master of Social Science (MSS) in Economics
education.details: Focused on advanced economic theories, research methodologies, and data analysis. Developed strong analytical and problem-solving skills applicable to real-world scenarios.

education.degree: Bachelor of Social Science (BSS) in Economics
education.details: Studied core economic principles, statistics, and quantitative analysis. Built a solid foundation in analytical thinking and data interpretation.

workingStyle.approach: I prefer writing clean, reusable components and following scalable architecture patterns.
workingStyle.teamwork: Comfortable working in teams and collaborating using Git workflows.
workingStyle.learning: Continuously learning new technologies and improving development practices.

goals: Become a highly skilled full-stack engineer
Master system design and scalable architecture
